name: wechat-export-reader
description: Read user-exported WeChat files from a local folder and build compact Codex-friendly indexes.

interface.shortDescription: Index local WeChat exports for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A privacy-first local workflow for reading only user-exported WeChat chats, public-account articles, and attachments. It does not access encrypted WeChat databases or credentials.
defaultPrompt: Find tasks in my WeChat exports.
